arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid's most valuable XIs of all-time
arts.sum: Stakes couldn’t be much higher for the Madrid derby tonight at the iconic Santiago Bernabeu. Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid are involved in a thrilling three-way title fight...

arts.ttl: 'Difference-maker' Jude Bellingham backed to end nightmare La Liga record
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has yet to score against Atletico Madrid for rivals Real Madrid but can set the record straight when he faces off against compatriot Conor Gallagher

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Atletico Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on local rivals Atletico Madrid in La Liga on Saturday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Real Madrid vs. Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Madrid vs. Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Atletico Madrid: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Atlético Madrid at the Santiago Bernabéu with little defensive options available.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid's five worst January transfers of all time
arts.sum: The Dutchman joined Los Blancos for €27m, but he played just 20 times for the club, scoring eight goals, before being sold to AC Milan for €15m after only seven months at the Santiago Bernabeu. However, after playing only 21 games for the club, Roberto returned to Brazil to join Flamengo on loan in 1998 and he subsequently secured a permanent move to Bayer Leverkusen for €7m.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer latest: Star rejects first contract offer as Saudi Pro League linked with summer move
arts.sum: One of Real Madrid's star players reportedly rejects the club's opening contract offer, fuelling speculation about a transfer to the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: Mbappé: “This is my first Madrid derby and I hope we can win”
arts.sum: The French striker, who has 22 goals to his name this season, gave his thoughts on RM Play Sessions : “It's going to be a great match and it's very important. I'm looking forward to playing and helping the team, and I hope we can win.”

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "The derby is always a special game"
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti spoke in the press room at Real Madrid City and discussed the matchday 23 LaLiga clash for the Madrid derby which will be played at the Santiago Bernabéu stadium (Saturday, 9 pm CET): “It's a very important match for two teams fighting to win the league. We're in an emergency situation and the team needs the defensive help of the four forwards who have scored more than 60 goals.”

arts.ttl: Ancelotti given numerous boosts to depleted Madrid squad
arts.sum: Based on current availability, Real Madrid’s probable starting eleven is: Courtois; Lucas Vázquez, Tchouaméni, Asencio, Fran García/Mendy; Valverde, Ceballos; Rodrygo, Bellingham, Vinícius; and Mbappé. For this crucial encounter, Ancelotti will regain five players who were absent from the Copa match : Thibaut Courtois, Lucas Vázquez, Eduardo Camavinga, Kylian Mbappé, and Jude Bellingham .
